2.q: SmCAT4-GST exhibited distinctly H2O2 scavenging capacity... silencing of SmCAT4 accompanied by an increase of H2O2 content and a decrease of CAT enzyme activity

3.q: SmERF1 silencing significantly reduced the relative transcript expression levels of the defense-related marker genes SmNCED1, SmNCED2, SmDHN1, and SmDHNX1, which were respectively reduced by approximately 81%, 86%, 93%, and 92%, in SmERF1-silenced eggplant roots
